title: Session 11: Phase 2 Validation of Stage 3 Signal Candidates

content.hypothesis: Two Stage 3 signal candidates (delta_stability, delta_correlation) can produce genuine eta adaptation that beats fixed canonical eta
content.method: Phase 2 validation pipeline: 3-seed ground truth, contamination check, eta non-trivial check, training gap comparison. Tested alpha_meta sweep [0.01, 0.05, 0.1] for each candidate. Fixed 6 bugs in harness.py before running.
content.result: PARTIAL. delta_stability PASSES Phase 2 at alpha_meta=0.05 and 0.10. delta_correlation FAILS across ALL alpha_meta values (improvement always negative).
content.root_cause: delta_correlation one-way design interprets successful adaptation as degradation, suppressing eta. delta_stability produces real but tiny improvements within noise floor.

constraints_implied: delta_correlation one-way eta adaptation actively harms performance - successful adaptation is misread as degradation
delta_stability Phase 2 improvement (+0.0068) is within noise floor - Phase 3 with 10+ seeds required to confirm
